review_title: Ruttl made client collaboration so much easier!
description: My overall experience with Ruttl has been amazing. It's easy to use, saves time, and makes collaboration with clients much more efficient and visual. It became a key part of my process, and I truly recommend it to other designers.
author: Marina A.
pros: Ruttl made my communication with clients much easier. I love being able to leave and receive comments directly on the website. It's intuitive, smooth, and helps a lot to speed up my workflow. The support team is also incredibly kind and attentive!
cons: So far, everything has worked really well for me. If I could suggest something, it would be offering more flexible plans for solo professionals. But overall, it's been a great experience!
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Amazing Features, Great Price
author: Yarden H.
pros: Very good UI and feature rich. Basically everything I need. Fair price. I compared it to Pastel, Atarim (complicated and a lot of friction), Maker but they all cost too much for the same features.
cons: Needs more roles so I can split developer comments from my comments from client comments. Currently they only offer private and public. They need to give you an option to filter based on users or based on groups.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

review_title: Would've been great if it worked.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Would be great if it worked. It was a really nice, easy to use interface and a very much needed tool. Nice that I could share with clients/partners for feedback.
cons: Too buggy to function. Genuinely encountered so many bugs so many times it makes it almost unusable. Bad support as well. Had issues with crashing. Also difficult to sort new comments and check things off to-do lists for dev going through and making edits.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Quarterly Website Updates Made Easy
author: Eric C.
pros: This software has made it effortless for my company to navigate our quarterly website changes across multiple departments. The feature to navigate as many pages as you need in one link is especially awesome. I switched over from marker and think this product is a much improved experience for everyone.
cons: I've seen lots of improvement with bugs and lagging, so no issues now! And they are responsive if you need help, so that's a plus if you do encounter something.
author_duration: Used the software for: 1-2 years

review_title: Affordable and easy to use feedback tool
description: Very positive! Our team finds it easy to use.
author: Kelly G.
pros: Easy to manage and respond to team feedback.
cons: I wish I could upload multiple jpgs as a single project
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Very Promissing But Not Great As of Now
description: I started to try it after I bought it 2 months ago. Guest now can comment via your sharable link without needing to sign up. It's a good thing. While they need to register their accounts on Ruttl when they want to save their editing. Sync is realtime, I can see comments from guests or collaborators. But it's also buggy as of now. I hope they can address it soon. One more thing, if they can add multiple translations and get rid of direct Google API, it would be great.
author: Stephen Z.
pros: - Modern and Clean UI - Easy-to-use UX and guide tour - Live site editing feature
cons: - Not working on Firefox, always loading. Then I have to use Chrome - Sometimes the inspect tool would choose wrong tag, then editing wouldn't work - Buggy: - It can't handle some special elements for example "Back to Top" button, the comment box will be covered by your OS status bar when you click it. - Replace Image often not working, sometime it will leave blank after you set a image. And it seems that SVG/WebP even PNG images are not well supported yet. - It seems that Ruttl relys on Google's API, so it's almost impossible to use in China.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

review_title: Ruttl is probably the best solution out there!
author: Cameron B.
pros: How simple it is to use. My clients intuitively knew what to do without me having to onboard them to the product.
cons: I think linking of live website pages could be easier? Instead of linking individually there could be an option to link all pages associated with a live website domain. It would be easier generally to remove the ones you don’t need rather than to add individual pages.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Time Saver!
description: As a Digital agency owner, time is my must valuable asset. Having clients commenting directly in a Design and not in a Work Document is time saving for everyone envolved. It takes off the weight and communicate directly with my creative team. So much easier to delegate.
author: Ricardo B.
pros: - Scroll page on Hover - Review Both Images and Websites - Mobile and Desktop views work seamlessly - The fact that you can hide below menu and work with a clean view its a plus. - You can "add latest version" without losing the anterior version... Time saving. - Support answers you fast
cons: It was slow at first but they upgraded now and it's working fine.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Perfect Client Feedback Tool
description: Overall I’ve had a great experience. It does exactly what I need to be able to do. I also reached out to support once and they were super quick to get back.
author: Carmen C.
pros: I find Ruttl to be hands down the best way to provide feedback on sales pages without needing to take screenshots and circle things on my phone. It's absolutely the most efficient way to work with clients, allowing me to provide feedback on sales pages (and websites) directly. I absolutely love the ability to pin comments, which is fantastic because it lets me be super specific with where and exactly I want the changes to be. Sharing it with clients is also super easy. The initial setup was incredibly easy and seamless, making it straightforward to transition and implement, which is why I continued to use it.
cons: The only downsides I’ve noticed this far is that you can’t view your pins on mobile, and the comments lose formatting.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Excellent everything!
description: Ruttl makes it super easy to collect comments directly on all our websites instead of using a ticketing system. The multiple device view is very useful — we can instantly check how a page looks on mobile, tablet, and desktop. That’s a big plus compared to other website review tools. Customer support is fast, helpful, and genuinely understanding whenever we reach out.
author: Andy H.
pros: Customer support is fast and very helpful and understanding. Easy to collect comments directly on all our websites, instead of per ticket basis. Have different devices view to check our websites from (other website reviewers dont have, that's why we chose Ruttl).
cons: Just that members are not being added automatically when adding new projects. Other than that, overall excellent product.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Efficient and Effective Collaboration
author: Anthony M.
pros: The software is so easy to use and implement for our clients. It solved our headache of emailing back and forth revisions from clients. Now, we have a software that records everything we need in 1 place. The customer support is very active as well.
cons: The only integration that is missing (for us that we want) as of 12-8-2021 is Clickup. However, it's on their roadmap. Looking forward to them adding it.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: UX friendly
author: Aman G.
pros: It's best for bug tracking and resolve UX issues
cons: It's best for bug tracking and resolve UX issues.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

review_title: Great for Team Web Design
author: Adam L.
pros: Easy for beginners to expert web designers
cons: More options for inexperienced designers would be Nic
author_duration: Used the software for: 1-2 years

review_title: Reaching to the point very rapidly.
author: Mayur K.
pros: Ruttle has a very amazing modern user interface and it's very easy to use. This app is way ahead of the competition.
cons: Ruttle lacs few feature. They should include audio notes and it's slow on loading the site. Sometimes, it does not render links properly.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Worst product ever
description: Purchased a subscription that charged money but subscription was not activated. I asked their support team, but they were not able to help. Canceled the subscription, but it charged money again. Trying to contact support, but there is a bug on the website to do so. They do not respond to emails. I guess it is a scam.
author: Dmytro Z.
pros: Nothing to highlight, terrible product, not recommend
cons: A lot of bugs, and unresponsive support AT ALL!
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: What a joke. Don't buy. Full with bugs, terrible customer support.
author: ⚡️ Evan K.
pros: Looked like a good alternative to usepastel
cons: The customer support was terrible. The response times were way too long and they deleted all of our customer data in trying to resolve an issue. They then proceeded to charge my card more than the pricing I signed up for. Run the other direction. It's not worth your time. The customer support reps clearly don't care enough to put the effort in.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Good tool, very useful and with improvements
description: I think it's a good product, with many improvements, but without a doubt it has become an important tool in our work, especially lately with remote work. The team's response times are good but could be improved, although I understand that it is partly due to the time difference. I would recommend it without a problem and more so because lately they have focused on adding new functions and it seems that they are making a heavy hand to the product.
author: Cristopher G.
pros: The best things about it are: - Allow interaction with created websites and pdfs of designs proposed to clients - Ease for customers to let us know their comments on each section - When you're connected to it, real-time notifications that someone commented - Being able to tag in the comments is great - The versioning and history is great
cons: What I don't like and should improve: - Email notifications when someone comments, practically nothing ever arrives and you should be checking the panel - Remove ruttl product promotions from the dashboard, customers do not understand when we invite them to comment, if they have to click on their advertising or what's up (I know, but there are customers of all kinds) - Allow access to a project without previous registration when it is shared, since it is forced and some clients do not enjoy forcing them to register. - It does not have integrations with platforms like Pabbly or others outside of Zapier which is very expensive.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

review_title: Best App for Getting Feedback on Live Websites
description: I love the clean and modern design, which is a joy to use and boosts my image with my clients. I like that my clients have been able to use it with almost no instruction... but there has been some confusion from my clients on how to do a few things, for example, to find and work off the latest revision. Also, there was a time where I didn't get any notifications that my client made comments... but I believe that was rectified.
author: Joe F.
pros: Has all the features needed to collaborate with clients on web design, including point and click to add comments on live website elements. Clients can collaborate as guests, but get more features if they login. As an agency, it can be white-labeled with a custom domain. As actual website revisions are made, ruttl can add revisions so that clients are commenting on the latest revision, not an outdated website.
cons: It's new, so some of the features are still getting worked out. But ruttl has been fast to acknowledge and usually fix any issues. I believe it's getting mature.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Ruttl is a Game Changer
description: I have been working with a team of designers on a project for the past few months and we have used the Ruttl tool for communication. It allows us to share feedback on our project with each other and the client in a way that is easy to understand for everyone involved. If we have questions about the project, the team is able to answer them quickly and effectively. I love that it is a tool that is easy to use and is always available to use on demand.
author: Kendra M.
pros: My favorite features are the comments mode (love video comments, btw), live edits, and mobile reviews. But more than that, I love being able to present a website in such a collaborative way to clients. Everything is easy to keep track of and everyone feels like their voice is heard during review sessions. Further, if someone can't make it to the meeting, they can log in later to leave comments. Invaluable!
cons: I honestly can't think of anything I didn't like. I've used it for three websites now, and didn't feel frustrated for any of them..
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

review_title: Absolutely necessary
description: Amazing! Support is really helpful and it even has a slack channel!
author: Francisco O.
pros: It cuts time in half and gives you the ability to receive all the feedback from your client in a very clear way, avoiding mistakes, misunderstanding. It even integrates with slack! You can upload images directly to the app and also screen record to make feedback even clearer.
cons: Its only in English, so if you or your clients or team don't speak it, its kind of difficult to use it.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

review_title: Ruttl is a great feedback tool I started using lately
author: Nazim A.
pros: Ruttl is really simple and easy to use. I love the UI and feedback tool window. My clients can give feedback on any element easily.
cons: Everything is good so far. I don't see any downside yet :)
author_duration: Used the software for: 1-2 years

review_title: Don't waste your time redesigning for real, Ruttl is faking it for you!
description: For any modern agency or freelancer who wishes to offer an extraordinary experience of creating or redesigning a website to its clients, Ruttl is the tool that has become essential. Where previously incomprehension or doubts could arise between the professional and the client, thanks to Ruttl, all this takes off: Ruttl helps the client to be understood, but also helps the professional to imagine the result. to the client. With Ruttl, sketches and tests are now easy, without ever wasting time setting them up for real unnecessarily. On top of that, the support team is responsive and attentive to their customers, so I highly recommend.
author: Ludovic C.
pros: Unlimited projects Unlimited pages Unlimited collaborators Edit mode Comment mode Unlimited team member/user team Custom branding
cons: Ruttl is only available in English for now, I hope the team will allow to have a custom platform.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Feels not ready yet
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: I like the modern and simple design of Ruttl and the features that make it easier for me to actively work on a website (or design) with my clients. I send them an invitation and they can then add comments to the design in real time, and I can respond.
cons: I would like to use Ruttl more often, but it doesn't feel good enough yet. A problem where one of my web pages cannot be displayed on Ruttl has been going on for over a month. I have been promised that they will take care of it and give me an update, but I can't put my customers off until then. So I have to (unfortunately) switch to other tools where it works. I really hope that Ruttl will bring more stability in the future, before new functions are released, because first of all the main product should work properly.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: An affordable collaborative solution for smaller agencies or freelancers
description: I have been so pleased with my decision to use Ruttl with clients. The ability to easily share designs with clients where they can mark up/comment on them has been invaluable. I have not used the bug tracking feature and cannot comment on that.
author: Jill S.
pros: I was looking for a budget-friendly alternative to UserSnap and I found it with this software. As a very small agency with a limited amount of projects per year, the price of this tool allows us to offer solutions that often only larger agencies have access to.
cons: When I began using this software it was in beta mode, and the UI was a little confusing. I wasn't confident that my clients would adopt the tool if it was anything but totally user-friendly. Over time, the team has made continuous improvements and has communicated these changes via email.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

review_title: Sometimes rough around the edges, but improves each week!
description: When I first signed up, it was quite rough around the edges, but we let them improve it based on our feedback plus the influx of feedback from their marketing campaign. In short, the experience improves each time we log in to check.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: The cost comparison to similar apps is great. The support is quick and usually helpful, they feel eager to grow and improve their platform. The 'versions' function is also great!
cons: They sometimes add features that are not fully ready, but I think they have grown past that and features really do improve weekly. The last time we did try the software, a website we tried was bugged and not viewable through Ruttl. We have not tried since.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
